title: Zhou Yang | Full Stack Engineer
description: Full stack engineer based in Shenzhen — 5 years of experience crafting clean, scalable web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript & Node.js.
tagline: Clean code · Full stack · Component design
heroSubtitle: Full Stack Engineer · 5 Years Exp · Shenzhen
heroDescription: A full-stack engineer passionate about engineering excellence, component-driven architecture, and end-to-end delivery — from thoughtful database design to pixel-perfect, performant user interfaces.
philosophyParagraph1: Great software is not the product of excessive abstraction. Rather, it is the deliberate simplification of complexity until every module, every component, and every API endpoint serves a clear and single purpose. I believe in writing code that is readable, maintainable, and testable.
philosophyParagraph2: My practice spans the full stack — from crafting responsive, animated frontend experiences with React and Next.js, to designing robust RESTful APIs with Node.js and Prisma. I thrive on taking features from concept to production, ensuring every layer of the stack is thoughtfully engineered.
highlight0Quote: Delivering complete features from database schema to polished UI — understanding how every layer connects leads to better architectural decisions and fewer integration surprises.
highlight1Quote: Writing clean, maintainable code is not optional — it is the foundation of sustainable software. Component-driven architecture, thoughtful naming, and rigorous self-testing are daily habits, not afterthoughts.
highlight2Quote: Fast to adapt, comfortable communicating across teams, and experienced in bridging the gap between technical implementation and business requirements — including 1 year of direct client-facing sales experience.
scriboSubtitle: Hong Kong smart clinic SaaS platform — appointment management, EMR, and patient engagement
scriboDescription: A comprehensive smart clinic management platform serving Hong Kong healthcare providers, streamlining appointment scheduling, electronic medical records, and patient communication workflows.
buffbuffSubtitle: Overseas gaming product marketplace — multi-currency, localized shopping experience
buffbuffDescription: A feature-rich cross-border gaming product marketplace with multi-language and multi-currency support, optimized for global gaming communities.
deltaforceSubtitle: Overseas game integration hub — tools, guides, and community platform for overseas Delta Force players
deltaforceDescription: An integrated gaming tools and community platform for the overseas Delta Force player community, featuring interactive tools, in-depth guides, and global player resources.
adminSubtitle: A minimal, ready-to-use admin dashboard template built with React and Ant Design — dynamic routing and RBAC included
adminDescription: A minimal, batteries-included admin dashboard. Built on Ant Design's component system with dynamic routing and RBAC permission control baked in — clone and start building.
ctaDescription: Currently based in Shenzhen and available for full-time, contract, or remote collaboration. If you need a full-stack engineer who delivers clean, scalable solutions — let's talk.
